title: Max Consecutive Subarray Sum Index Validation

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, find the first pair of elements in the array that add up to `target`. The pair indices may not be sorted, and we do not care which number is larger in the pair.
statement.inputFormat: Input is provided as a single line containing a space-separated list of numbers, and a target sum as integers
statement.outputFormat: Output should be a single line containing the pair indices (i, j) where i < j, as integers, space-separated
statement.notes: There may be multiple pairs of numbers in the array that add up to the target sum. You can assume that such a pair exists.

functionSignature.python: def twoSum(self, nums: List[int], target: int) -> List[int]:
